name: youtube-mcp-server
title: YouTube
description: YouTube video search, channel discovery, playlist browsing, and transcript extraction via Data API v3
author: ZubeidHendricks

env.name: YOUTUBE_API_KEY
env.description: YouTube Data API v3 key from Google Cloud Console

setup.help_text: Create a project at Google Cloud Console, enable the YouTube Data API v3, then create an API key under Credentials. Restrict the key to YouTube Data API v3 only.
prerequisites: Google Cloud project with YouTube Data API v3 enabled

certification.security_notes: Read-only YouTube Data API access. API key scoped to YouTube Data API v3. No write operations, no OAuth user context.

notes: 10-tool YouTube MCP (473 stars). Covers video search with advanced filters, channel info with subscriber band filtering, creator discovery, playlist browsing, and transcript extraction. Requires YouTube Data API v3 key.
